response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A. No lyrics provided as the content is purely dialogue. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription was performed for all spoken dialogue and prominent on-screen text overlays (Rules, Questions/Answers). 3. Timing & Pacing: Timestamps are tightly anchored to vocal starts and visual text appearances. Transitions in rapid speech are handled with instantaneous end-to-start matching to prevent cascading delays.

subtitles.original: And with us we have our lovely contestant, Bae!
subtitles.english: And with us we have our lovely contestant, Bae!

subtitles.original: As I said before, we're here to find out...
subtitles.english: As I said before, we're here to find out...

subtitles.original: ...who's the ultimate winner of Physical Autofister 100!
subtitles.english: ...who's the ultimate winner of Physical Autofister 100!

subtitles.original: Before our commercial break, each contestant...
subtitles.english: Before our commercial break, each contestant...

subtitles.original: ...will have to compete in our physical obstacle course of FUN!
subtitles.english: ...will have to compete in our physical obstacle course of FUN!

subtitles.original: If you're just now tuning in, here is a quick recap!
subtitles.english: If you're just now tuning in, here is a quick recap!

subtitles.original:
[Rules]
1. Start in a line
2. Run to the other side while avoiding obstacles
3. Do pre-decided physical activity
4. Grab a question from dragon
5. Run back and answer the question in ENGLISH
subtitles.english:
[Rules]
1. Start in a line
2. Run to the other side while avoiding obstacles
3. Do pre-decided physical activity
4. Grab a question from dragon
5. Run back and answer the question in ENGLISH

subtitles.original: ...and the person with the most points at the end of four rounds is the winner!
subtitles.english: ...and the person with the most points at the end of four rounds is the winner!

subtitles.original: Okay! Well, everyone get into positions!
subtitles.english: Okay! Well, everyone get into positions!

subtitles.original: I see something very big in the... what is this?
subtitles.english: I see something very big in the... what is this?

subtitles.original: As I said before, of course, since a lot of these questions will be in English...
subtitles.english: As I said before, of course, since a lot of these questions will be in English...

subtitles.original: The first run, the first round is...
subtitles.english: The first run, the first round is...

subtitles.original: ...you run over there and you do five jumping jacks.
subtitles.english: ...you run over there and you do five jumping jacks.

subtitles.original: 走って、5回ジャンプやって、
質問とって、走って帰る。
subtitles.english: take a question, and run back.

subtitles.original: Please read the question out loud!
subtitles.english: Please read the question out loud!

subtitles.original: Okay, she had to name a fruit!
subtitles.english: Okay, she had to name a fruit!

subtitles.original: You can give me your questions over here.
subtitles.english: You can give me your questions over here.

subtitles.original: Wait, we have to play. Is everyone ready for the next round?
subtitles.english: Wait, we have to play. Is everyone ready for the next round?

subtitles.original: I'm the crab walk like this!
subtitles.english: I'm the crab walk like this!

subtitles.original: 5回スクワット？スクワット、クラブウォークと5回スクワット？
subtitles.english: Five squats? Squats, crab walk and five squats?

subtitles.original: Wait, do they have to jump?
subtitles.english: Wait, do they have to jump?

subtitles.original: えっと、なんてんだっけ？えっと... 1! 2! 3!
それスクワットじゃねえし！
Come on! Oh, I ripped the mind telepathy paper!
subtitles.english: Come on! Oh, I ripped the mind telepathy paper!

subtitles.original: You can't rip our telepathy paper!
subtitles.english: You can't rip our telepathy paper!

subtitles.original: Oh, she's kind of really good at math!
subtitles.english: Oh, she's kind of really good at math!

subtitles.original: またバナナなんだけど！
え？2回連続バナナなんだけど！
subtitles.english: Eh? Twice in a row it's banana!

subtitles.original:
[Towa's 1st Question: WHAT COLOR IS A BANANA?]
[Towa's 2nd Question: WHEN'S THE LAST TIME YOU ATE A BANANA?]
subtitles.english:
[Towa's 1st Question: WHAT COLOR IS A BANANA?]
[Towa's 2nd Question: WHEN'S THE LAST TIME YOU ATE A BANANA?]

subtitles.original: おい！日本語書いてんじゃねえか！
subtitles.english: Hey! Why is it written in Japanese?!

subtitles.original: What! I was given a handicap because the questions are in English...
subtitles.english: What! I was given a handicap because the questions are in English...

subtitles.original: Okay, okay, we've gotta keep it rolling, guys!
subtitles.english: Okay, okay, we've gotta keep it rolling, guys!

subtitles.original: Do I still have to go around and around?!
subtitles.english: Do I still have to go around and around?!

subtitles.original: The next one is... Sexy walk!
subtitles.english: The next one is... Sexy walk!

subtitles.original: Do we get disqualified, do we have to start again if it's not sexy enough?
subtitles.english: Do we get disqualified, do we have to start again if it's not sexy enough?

subtitles.original: Yes! Hot, please make up your mind!
subtitles.english: Yes! Hot, please make up your mind!

subtitles.original: Yes, sexy walk! Sexy jump! Sexy jump!
subtitles.english: Yes, sexy walk! Sexy jump! Sexy jump!

subtitles.original: で、セクシーさが足りなかったら万が一やり直しって言われてるから。
subtitles.english: If the sexiness isn't enough, we might have to redo it!

subtitles.original: ええー？！セクシーが足りない？！

subtitles.english: Leave it to me, leave it to me!
